titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Wahib Ibn Hafs

text: و ما كان فيه عن وهيب بن حفص فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عمّه محمّد بن أبي القاسم، عن محمّد بن عليّ الهمدانيّ، عن وهيب بن حفص الكوفيّ المعروف بالمنتوف‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Wahib ibn Hafs has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his uncle Muhammad ibn Abi Al-Qasim, from Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Hamdani, from Wahib ibn Hafs Al-Kufi, who was known as Al-Muntaf.
